name: 24"x15" Arch Wall Mirror with Shelf and Pegs Brown/Black - Threshold™: Modern Style, Horizontal Orientation, Includes Mounting Hardware
description:
Add functional style to your home decor with the Arch Wall Mirror with Shelf and Pegs from Threshold™. Designed in an arch shape, this metal-frame wall mirror makes a practical addition to your entryway, bedroom or any other space you want to organize. This wall mirror comes complete with a wooden shelf and pegs to help you organize keys, bags, jackets and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
